exercises.title: Mosca Analysis
exercises.description: Apply Mosca inequality to different scenarios.
tasks: Calculate for healthcare records (5yr migrate, 50yr secret)
Calculate for financial transactions (3yr migrate, 7yr secret)
Calculate for government secrets (10yr migrate, 75yr secret)
hints: If x + y > z (assume z=15), migration should start now

exercises.title: Assessment Template
exercises.description: Create an assessment questionnaire for your organization.

exercises.title: Gap Analysis
exercises.description: Conduct a gap analysis for a sample organization.
tasks: Identify gaps in skills and processes
hints: Consider technology, process, and people gaps

exercises.title: Executive Report
exercises.description: Create an executive summary for PQC migration.
hints: Focus on business impact and actions
